## Description
Describe the changes introduced by this pull request. Explain the rationale behind the solution or mathematical adjustments made.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature / extension (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behavior to change)
- [ ] Research experiment results / documentation update

## How Has This Been Tested?
Explain how you verified the changes (e.g., convergence checks, testing with Qwen/LLaMA weight matrices, SVD decomposition verification).

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas (e.g. SVD/QR decompositions)
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or OOM errors
